sections.sectionTitle: Abraham in Sarah A Vuina ding Han Khat Lei

verses.text: Sarah kum za leh kum sawmnihlesagih nungta a
Kanaan mite' gamsung Kiriatharba (Hebron)-ah a si hi. Abraham dahin kap a, a vuina ding vaihawm hi
Abraham in a misi nusia-in Hit mite kiangah va pai a
“Kei pen note lakah khualmi hi-in peemta ka hi hi. Ka zi ka vui theihna dingin note' lakah vuina ding mun leitang hong pia un,” a ci hi
Hit mite in Abraham dawngin

“Topa aw, kote' thu hong ngai in. Nang pen kote' lakah a vanglian ulian khat na hi hi. Kote' han na deih pen munah na zi vui in. Kote kuamah in nang-a' dingin a han itlo ding a, na zi vui ding hong khaktanlo ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Abraham dingin tua gammi ahi Hit mite' lamah a kun hi
Amah in amaute' kiangah, “Hih gamah ka zi ka vui ding nong deih uh leh, ka thu hong ngai un. Zohar' tapa Efron in

ama neih Makpelah leihawm kei tungah hong piak theihna dingin hong thum sak un. Tua pen ama lo nawlah om hi. Vuina ding munin ka neihna dingin a man ding cing takin piakna tawh note' muhna-ah kei tungah amah hong pia sak un,” a ci hi
Tua laitakin Hit mite' lakah Efron zong a om ahi hi. Khuapi kulhkongpi-ah a hong pai Hit mite khempeuh' zakna-ah Hit mi Efron in Abraham dawng a
“Hilo hi, ka topa aw, hong ngai in. Nang' tungah lo kong pia hi. Tua sunga leihawm zong nang' tungah kong pia hi. Ka mipihte' muhna-ah nang' tungah kong pia hi. Na misi vui in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin tua gam mite' mai-ah Abraham a kun hi

Tua gam mite' zakna-ah amah in Efron' kiangah, “Lungsim takpi tawh na cih ahih leh hong ngai in. Lo man ding kong pia ding hi. Tua lai-ah ka misi ka vui theihna dingin kei' tung panin a man hong sang in,” a ci hi
Efron in Abraham dawngin
“Ka topa aw, ka thu hong ngai in. Leitang bek khat in ngun shekel za li man hi. Nang leh kei' kikalah bang thudang omnawn ahi hiam? Na misi vui in,” a ci hi
Efron' cih bangin Abraham thukim hi. Abraham in Efron-a' dingin, Hit mite' zakna-ah a min lawh zah, tua hun laitaka sumbukte' lakah a kizang a gikzah tawh kizui-in ngun shekel za li a tehkhia hi
Tua ahih ciangin Makpelah-a Efron' lo, Mamre nisuahna lamah a om, a sunga om leihawm leh a lo, leh tua mun khempeuhah a om lo sunga singte pen
khuapi kulhkongpi-ah a kikhawm mite khempeuh' mai, Hit mite' omna-ah Abraham' neih dingin kipia hi
Hih bangin a kihih khit ciangin, Kanaan gam sunga om Mamre (Hebron) nisuahna lamah a om Makpelah lo sunga leihawm sungah Abraham in a zi Sarah a vui hi
Lo leh a sunga om leihawmte si vuina ding munin a neih dingin Abraham' tungah Hit mite in a pia uh hi.
